{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/80325255?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/christos-eth", "id": 80325255, "login": "christos-eth", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjgwMzI1MjU1", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-65912", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-183", "name": "Permissive List of Allowed Inputs"}], "description": "## Summary
DOMPurify allows `ADD_ATTR` to be provided as a predicate function via `EXTRA_ELEMENT_HANDLING.attributeCheck`. When the predicate returns `true`, `_isValidAttribute` short-circuits the attribute check before URI-safe validation runs. An attacker who supplies a predicate that accepts specific attribute/tag combinations can then sanitize input such as `<a href="javascript:alert(document.domain)">` and have the `javascript:` URL survive, because URI validation is skipped for that attribute while other checks still pass. The provided PoC accepts `href` for anchors and then triggers a click inside an iframe, showing that the sanitized payload executes despite the protocol bypass.

## Impact
Predicate-based allowlisting bypasses DOMPurify's URI validation, allowing unsafe protocols such as `javascript:` to reach the DOM and execute whenever the link is activated, resulting in DOM-based XSS.

## Credits
Identified by Cantina’s Apex (https://www.cantina.security).", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cjmm-f4jc-qw8r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-03T03:46:07Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cjmm-f4jc-qw8r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cjmm-f4jc-qw8r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-65912"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-03T03:46:07Z", "references": ["https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify/security/advisories/GHSA-cjmm-f4jc-qw8r", "https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify/releases/tag/3.3.2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cjmm-f4jc-qw8r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/cure53/DOMPurify/security-advisories/GHSA-cjmm-f4jc-qw8r", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify", "summary": "DOMPurify ADD_ATTR predicate skips URI validation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-23T14:04:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cjmm-f4jc-qw8r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.3.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "dompurify"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.3.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: DOMPurify ADD_ATTR predicate skips URI validation
